intro: Between April 22 and 27, 2026, ZCyberNews published 10 articles tagged with ESET, covering a period of high-severity activity. GopherWhisper, APT33, and LockBit were the top threat actors observed, with attacks primarily targeting government, business services, energy, finance, and financial services sectors. The affected regions included Global, Mongolia, Europe, Japan, and the Middle east. The severity mix of these reports was one informational, seven high, and one medium.
